mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, user_email, mode, status, last_updated FROM chat_session WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, user_email, mode, status, last_updated FROM chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id, user_email, mode, status, last_updated FROM chat_session ORDER BY last_updated DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session (id, user_id, user_email, mode, status, last_updated) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{userEmail}, #{mode}, #{status}, #{lastUpdated})
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session SET mode = #{mode} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chat_session SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chat_session SET last_updated = #{lastUpdated} WHERE id = #{id}
